functional definition? Of course not.
This is the self organizing concept of
the team. So that's why A is not

part in guiding the product direction.
Who directs the product? Of course, the
product owner. So that's why B is not
correct. Assign individuals who possess
the necessary skills to produce a
functioning product. This is exactly
what the organization should do. The
correct answer should be C. D. Empower

shippable product increment. Who
